message:
🐛 Fix stale matcher tests to match always-return-results behavior (#1563)

matcher.ts was updated (PRs #1547, #1552, #1556) to always return
results with baseline scoring (minimum score of 1) for the
'Recommended for You' section. The 4 failing tests expected empty
arrays for non-matching missions and outdated score values.

- Rename 'returns empty array' tests to 'returns baseline-scored results'
- Update troubleshoot issue score from 40 to 75 (adds +35 category match)
- Update non-troubleshoot issue test to check baseline score instead of empty
- All 293 tests now pass

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
